Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope

Class MainApplicationScope

java.lang.Object
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.AbstractApplicationScope
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.scope.MainApplicationScope
All Implemented Interfaces:
ApplicationScope, JvmScope, AutoCloseable
public final class MainApplicationScope
extends AbstractApplicationScope
ApplicationScope for the main codebase.
